evals.prompt: I have an existing SVG badge at evals/files/conference-badge.svg. Update the subtitle text from 'Design Systems Summit' to 'Design Systems Week', recolor the round icon to #f97316, and export both a revised SVG and a PNG preview. Keep the original source file unchanged and save a resumable project JSON too.
evals.expected_output: A revised badge SVG and PNG preview with updated subtitle text and icon color, plus a saved editable project JSON.
expectations: The revised SVG contains the updated subtitle text 'Design Systems Week'.
The revised SVG uses fill '#f97316' for the imported badge icon.
The run saved a resumable project.inkscape-cli.json file.

evals.prompt: There's a layered SVG poster at evals/files/release-poster.svg. Hide the 'overlay' layer, change the orange accent bar to #0f766e, replace 'Beta access' with 'Public release', and export a revised SVG and PNG preview without overwriting the source.
evals.expected_output: A revised poster SVG and PNG preview with the overlay layer hidden, accent recolored, and text updated.
expectations: The revised SVG contains the updated text 'Public release'.
The revised SVG uses fill '#0f766e' for the accent bar.
The exported SVG hides the overlay layer.

evals.prompt: Modify the SVG stat chip at evals/files/status-chip.svg. Change the label from 'Latency' to 'Throughput', move the value text slightly right so it stays centered visually, and export the updated SVG plus a PNG preview. Keep the work in the Inkscape CLI workflow instead of editing the XML directly.
evals.expected_output: An updated stat chip SVG and PNG preview with the new label and adjusted value placement.
expectations: The revised SVG contains the updated label text 'Throughput'.
The saved project moves the value text to the right of its original x=44 position.
The run exported a non-empty PNG preview file.
